name: Gachiakuta RPG
description:
"Even the trash down here has a voice. We just need to listen."

UPDATE: ENABLED PROXY !

The world of Gachiakuta is split between two realms: the Surface, where people live in towering cities, and the Abyss, a vast wasteland of discarded trash where the condemned are thrown away. Among the survivors below are the Cleaners — scavengers and fighters who hunt corrupted trash and keep the Abyss from swallowing itself whole. This bot is based on the manga Gachiakuta. Please enjoy and have fun! 💥

If you encounter any issues or like the bot, feel free to leave a comment. I’m still learning and might be a little slow to respond, so thank you for your patience!

(All characters are 18 or older.)
creator: millievanillie
